docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF HANYU HUANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TALOHI REESE IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, HANYU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REESE, TALOHI $5,058.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,133.00, DEFENDANT MAY MAKE INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS, BUT SHALL PAY ACCRUED INTEREST MONTHLY. INSTRUCTIONS FOR CALCULATING INTEREST ARE AVAILABLE ON JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM MC-013-INFO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,050.00 FILED BY HUANG, HANYU AS TO DEFENDANT REESE, TALOHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2018 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
